LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KENNETH POWELL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/WRIT OF POSSESSION/LEAVE TO DEFEND. MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS TO FILE RESPONSIVE PLEADINGS TO THE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ON AUGUST 15, 2006. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
STEVEN S. MIYAKE, ESQ., (415) 421-4400, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, KENNETH POWELL
CHRISTINA N. DABIS, ESQ. OF WIEGEL & FRIED, LLP, (510) 625-0100, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, ANTHONY WILSON BELMONTE

MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT KENNETH POWELL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/WRIT OF POSSESSION/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. THERE WAS NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT IS TO FILE RESPONSIVE PLEADINGS TO THE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ON OR BY AUGUST 15, 2006. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PJB/) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
